metadata.task_title: Copy text from Word to the Notes section in Powerpoint
metadata.instruction: Copy presentation notes from word document located in Task ID 55.docx to my presentation slide Task ID 55.pptx, both in Documents > Task 55 folder.
metadata.context: I’m giving a presentation tomorrow and I want to move my talking points from a word document to the Notes section of my presentation.
